title: Boundless Building
body:
# Boundless Building

I just felt like I was **missing lots of blocks** I needed **while building** cities and such. So instead of constantly making new texture packs for each map **why not make a mod for everyone and everything!**

If you **find any Bugs** you can **tell me in the comments** of [**this video**](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0-wNfdJ9u3E) (even in english)

⚠ **This mod is in BETA and lacking lots of features I would like to add, but it already adds  tones of new and very useful blocks you will want!** ⚠

Check out the blocks:
![cool blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xVbIvP4Z/images/4c014a922f0f1d8f68003b2dda2c6191710aec60.png)

# Recipes
